overview.description: The Franklin New Jersey Municipal Income ETF (FTNJ) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund is actively managed and invests in municipal bonds exempt from federal income tax and New Jersey personal income tax with maturities of at least three years. FTNJ was launched on Nov 10, 2025 and is issued by Franklin Templeton.
